chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2629 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «تَلْبَسُ اَلْمَرْأَةُ اَلْمُحْرِمَةُ اَلْحَائِضُ تَحْتَ ثِيَابِهَا غِلاَلَةً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2629 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"A woman in Ihram who is menstruating may wear an inner garment (ghilalah) under her clothes."
